title: missing cells using task in Verilog

features.name: task with output vector and internal reg declarations
features.description: Code should include a task definition with both an output parameter declared as a 2-bit vector and internal reg declarations that shadow the output name

features.name: chained task calls with vector outputs in always block
features.description: Code should include multiple sequential task calls in an always block where task outputs (2-bit vectors) feed into subsequent task inputs

features.name: 2-bit reg arrays for task output chaining
features.description: Code should include multiple 2-bit reg arrays used to chain task outputs
